text:
```python
# Given 2D list
data = [[1, 2], [3, 4], [5, 6]]

# Initialize column sums
column_sums = [0, 0]

# Compute column-wise sums
for row in data:
    column_sums[0] += row[0]
    column_sums[1] += row[1]

# Print the result as the last line of stdout
print(column_sums)
```
Output: [9, 12]
